headline: Micron’s Sold Out HBM Capacity Tests Valuation And AI Cash Flow Story
summary: Micron Technology’s advanced memory and high bandwidth memory (HBM) supply is reported to be fully committed through 2026 and into 2027. The company is securing long term capacity agreements with major AI data center customers, tying up HBM and DRAM output well beyond the typical cycle. This extends visibility into AI infrastructure demand and highlights Micron’s role as a key memory supplier to leading chipmakers. For investors tracking NasdaqGS:MU, this news comes as the stock trades...
